DOWNLOAD


WickedWhims v185k

May 23rd, 2026

Supported Game Versions:

1.126.58/July 21

1.125.59/June 30, 1.124.63/May 21,
1.123.85/April 28, 1.122.218/March 23, 1.121.372/February 19,


1.120.140/January 13, 1.119.109/November 4, 1.118.257/October 2, 1.117.244/September 4, 1.116.240/July 29

Update Patch Notes

Download from...

WICKED.CC

or

ITCH.IO


Follow the Installation Instructions to properly install WickedWhims.

No additional mods are required to use all available functionalities of WickedWhims.
No packs are required to use WickedWhims, but certain features might not be available.
Conflicting Mods:
• WonderfulWhims
